ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (a:Person {name: 'Martin Scorsese'})-[r1:ACTED_IN {roles: ['Director']}]->(b:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver'}),
    p2 = (a)-[r2:DIRECTED]->(c:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver'}),
    p3 = (b)-[r3:REVIEWED]->(d:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver', tagline: 'A man who has seen too much, becomes a man who sees too little'})
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: How does Martin Scorsese’s dual role as both a leading actor and director in *Taxi Driver* influence the film’s critical reception, particularly given the specific director’s notes in its tagline?

cypher:
MATCH (p:Person {name: "Martin Scorsese"})-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie {title: "Taxi Driver"})
WITH m
MATCH (p)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m)
WITH p, m
MATCH (p)-[:DIRECTED]->(m)<-[:DIRECTED]-(director:Person {name: "Martin Scorsese"})
WITH p, m, director
MATCH (director)-[:PRODUCED]->(m)
WITH p, m, director
MATCH (director)-[:DIRECTED]->(m)<-[:DIRECTED]-(director2:Person {name: "Martin Scorsese"})
WITH p, m, director, director2
MATCH (p)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m)<-[:REVIEWED]-(r:Person)-[:REVIEWED]->(m)
RETURN p, m, director, director2, r.rating AS rating, r.summary AS summary
